name: Master of Business Administration
description: Consists of 11 core modules and 8 elective modules. Block Release and Distance Learning.

modules.name: Select Two Electives
options: A9-RMF-17: Risk Management in Financial Institutions
A9-FTM-17: Financial Markets and Treasury Management
B9-NPD-17: New Product Development and Management

name: Master of Commerce in Human Resource Management
description: Facilitates professional and corporate development of business leaders. Develops competence in human development and planning.

modules.name: Contemporary Issues in Work Employment and People Management
Select One Elective
options: B9-CCW-22: Counselling and Coaching at the Workplace
B9-MSH-22: Management of Safety and Health

name: Master of Commerce in Banking
description: Postgraduate degree focusing on commerce, accounting, management and economics related to banking, financial and investment sectors.

modules.name: Corporate Finance and Financial Statement Analysis

name: Bachelor of Commerce in Finance
description: Comprehensive programme covering financial accounting, management accounting, corporate finance, and investment management.

modules.name: Select One Elective
options: A7-REI-21: Real Estate Investment and Finance

name: Bachelor of Commerce in Accounting
description: Comprehensive accounting programme covering financial reporting, taxation, auditing, and corporate governance.

modules.name: Business Analysis and Valuation Using Financial Statements

name: Bachelor of Commerce in Risk Management
description: Specialist programme covering risk assessment, insurance, financial risk management, and corporate governance.

modules.name: Select One Elective
options: A7-PIA-20: Portfolio Management and Investment Analysis

name: Bachelor of Commerce in Investment and Banking
description: Specialist programme covering investment analysis, banking theory, treasury management, and financial markets.

modules.name: Select One Elective
options: A7-FSF-21: Financial Innovation and Structured Finance

name: Bachelor of Business Administration in Business Management
description: Broad business management programme covering operations, marketing, HR, finance, and strategic management.

modules.name: Select Two Electives
options: B7-BEC-21: Business Ethics and Corporate Social Responsibility

name: Bachelor of Commerce in Supply Chain Management
description: Focuses on efficient coordination of production and distribution of goods and services across global supply chains.

modules.name: Supply Chain Relationship and Enterprise Planning

name: Master of Science in Information Systems Management
description: Covers big data management, information security, ICT project management and systems development governance.

name: Bachelor of Science in Data Science
description: Covers machine learning, artificial intelligence, data analytics, statistics, and programming for data-driven solutions.

name: Bachelor of Science in Cybersecurity and Risk Management
description: Covers cybersecurity fundamentals, network security, risk management, ethical hacking, and cyber law.

modules.name: Introduction to Computer in Cyber Security
Basics for Corporate Security and Risk Management
Introduction to Risk Analysis and Loss Prevention
Security Strategies in Windows and Linux Platforms
Cyber Security and Workplace Safety Programs
Workplace Safety Programs in Botswana and SADC Region
Select One Elective
options: C7-PRC-23: Public Relations and Customer Care

modules.name: Advanced Risk Analysis and Loss Prevention

name: Bachelor of Science in Network Security and Computer Forensics
description: Covers networking fundamentals, ethical hacking, malware analysis, digital forensics, and cyber law.

modules.name: Select One Elective
options: C8-ISG-23: Information Security Management and Governance

name: Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering
description: Comprehensive engineering programme covering electrical circuits, power systems, electronics, and embedded system design. 5.5 year programme.

modules.name: Procedural Programming in C and Python
Select One Elective
options: E7-PER-23: Power Electronics for Renewable Energy Systems
E7-CDE-23: CAD Design of Electrical Services

name: Master of Education in Higher Education
description: Teaching qualification that prepares learners to become qualified and professional teachers in higher education.

modules.name: Governance and Management in Higher Education
Select One Elective
options: D9-PTH-14: Principles and Techniques of Counselling in Higher Education

name: Bachelor of Science in Health Information Management
description: Covers health information systems, medical databases, disease coding, epidemiology and health informatics.

name: Bachelor of Science in Safety, Health and Environmental Management
description: Covers occupational health and safety, environmental management, risk management, ergonomics, and disaster management. Minimum 504 credits required.

modules.name: Introduction to Occupational Health and Safety Management
Occupational Health and Safety Law I
Occupational Health and Safety Law II
Select Two Electives
options: D7-HST-21: Health and Safety in Transport

name: Bachelor of Science in Hospital Administration
description: Covers hospital management, health informatics, disease coding, healthcare quality management, and medical statistics.

modules.name: Hospital Services Management Core, Support and Utility
Patient Care and Safety in Hospitals
Ethical and Legal Issues in Administration

name: Bachelor of Science in Health Informatics
description: Combines health sciences with information technology, covering health information systems, telemedicine, and medical databases.

modules.name: Select One Elective
options: D7-EMR-23: Introduction to Electronic Medical Records

name: Diploma in Occupational Health & Safety
description: Covers occupational health and safety management, toxicology, ergonomics, emergency preparedness and industrial attachment.

modules.name: Introduction to Occupational Health and Safety Management
Introduction to Occupational Hygiene and Toxicology
Occupational Health and Safety Law I
Safety Management and the Built Environment
Occupational Health and Safety Law II
Select One Elective
options: D7-HST-21: Health and Safety in Transport

name: Bachelor of Commerce in Hospitality Management
description: Comprehensive programme covering professional cookery, front office, food & beverage, tourism and hospitality management.

modules.name: Principles of Hospitality and Tourism Management
Tourism and Hospitality Law and Ethics
Hospitality Operations and Supply Chain Management
Quality Systems for the Hospitality Industry

options: H7-RCD-22: Risk, Crisis and Disaster Management

name: Bachelor of Technology in Software Engineering
description: This programme is designed to enable the students to create high-quality software applications for complex organisational environments, with an emphasis on good engineering practices that allow for ease of maintenance and the use of existing components.

modules.name: Introduction to Computing and Programming I (MS Office & Programming Basics)
Professional, Ethical, and Social Issues in Computing

options: C7-PDS-23: Parallel and Distributed Software Engineering
